verse_text: Observe what I command you this day. Behold, I am driving out from before you the Amorite, the Canaanite, the Perizzite, the Hittite, the Hivite, the Gergesite, and the Jebusite.

links.context: Sons of Israel profaned the holy things of the Lord. Too often they followed foreign gods through intermarriage with pagan women, which was prohibited (see [[EXO.34:11]]-16; [[DEU.7:1]]-4). St. Paul echoes this truth in saying, "Do not be unequally yoked together with unbelievers" ([[2CO.6:14]]).
